title: Run Powerful AI Locally: The Future is 18 Months Away! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof predicts that small, open-source language models will run locally on consumer hardware within 18 months to 2 years. This shift would reduce cloud dependence and decentralize AI processing.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that small, open-source language models will run locally on consumer hardware within 18 months to 2 years. The claim matters because local inference would cut reliance on cloud providers and decentralize where AI processing happens. The central takeaway is a timeline prediction tied to a shift from cloud-hosted models toward on-device execution.
